ext x
  constructor

    rcases hx with ⟨n, hnpos, A, B, hAB, hcard, hinter, hmem, hf, rfl⟩

    classical
    rcases hf with ⟨f, hf01, hfcard⟩
    have : ((A (⟨0, by
        have : 0 < 2 * n + 1 := by
          exact Nat.succ_pos _
        simpa using this⟩)).filter (fun x => f x = 0)).card = n := hfcard _
    have h2n : (A (⟨0, by
        have : 0 < 2 * n + 1 := by
          exact Nat.succ_pos _
        simpa using this⟩)).card = 2 * n := hcard _
    have hfilter_le : ((A (⟨0, by
        have : 0 < 2 * n + 1 := by
          exact Nat.succ_pos _
        simpa using this⟩)).filter (fun x => f x = 0)).card ≤
        (A (⟨0, by
          have : 0 < 2 * n + 1 := by
            exact Nat.succ_pos _
          simpa using this⟩)).card := by
      exact Finset.card_le_card (Finset.filter_subset _ _)
    have hn_le_2n : n ≤ 2 * n := by
      simpa [this, h2n] using hfilter_le
    have : 2 ∣ n := by
      exact Nat.dvd_of_modEq_zero (by
        have : n % 2 = 0 := by
          exact Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_of_even (Nat.even_iff.2 (Nat.mul_right_even n 2))
        simpa using this)
    exact this
  · intro hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hnpos, hneven⟩
    refine ⟨x, hnpos, (fun _ => ∅), ∅, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩

    · classical

      · intro i; simp [hneven]

ext x
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨n, hn, A, B, hA, hcard, hinter, hmem, hf, rfl⟩
    classical
    by_contra hx
    have hx' : ¬ (2 ∣ n) := by
      simpa [hn, and_true] using hx
    rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one n with hmod | hmod
    · exact hx' (Nat.dvd_of_modEq_zero hmod)
    · have : False := by
        have : n % 2 = 0 := by
          simpa [hmod] using congrArg (fun t => (t + n) % 2) (by rfl : 0 = 0)
        exact Nat.ne_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt n (by decide)) (by simpa [hmod] using this)
      exact this.elim
  · rintro ⟨hxpos, hxeven⟩
    refine ⟨x, hxpos, (fun _ => ∅), ∅, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · intro i
      simp
    · intro i
      simp [hxpos.ne']
    · intro i j hij
      simp
    · intro y hy
      simp at hy
    · refine ⟨(fun _ => 0), ?_, ?_⟩
      · intro y hy
        simp
      · intro i
        simp [hxpos.ne']
